batch.title: Multi-item sale (one customer)
batch.intro: Add one line per product. The customer and sale type and currency below apply to every line. Each line becomes a separate sale (status: pending — update in the list as usual).

dispatch.title: Create dispatch
dispatch.typeHint: Dostavshik: assign your courier here. BTS: carrier logistics; delivery and payments are still tracked in the Dispatchers tab.
dispatch.paymentMade: Payment made (if unchecked, will be recorded as payable)
dispatch.errSelectDispatcher: Select a dispatcher for courier delivery.
dispatch.errNoDispatchers: No active dispatchers. Add one under Dispatchers.

completeFromOrder.title: Complete sale from order — Sale #{{id}}
completeFromOrder.paymentHint: Payment (UZS and/or USD — mixed amounts use CB rate):
completeFromOrder.remainingHint: · Do not exceed this in {{currency}}; you may collect the balance in {{otherCurrency}} (confirmation required).
completeFromOrder.errPrice: Selling price is required and must be greater than 0
completeFromOrder.successDispatch: Sale completed! Please enter dispatch information.

sellReserved.title: Complete reserved sale #{{id}}
sellReserved.intro: Enter the UZS and/or USD amount for the remaining balance.
sellReserved.discountHint: Payment is below the balance due. Select Discount to record the remainder, or collect more.
sellReserved.loadingCbu: Loading CB exchange rate for split payment…
sellReserved.errPayment: Please enter at least one payment amount.
sellReserved.errDiscount: Payment is below the balance due. Select Discount to record the remainder, or collect more.

completePay.title: Complete sale #{{id}}
completePay.intro: Enter the UZS and/or USD amount received. You may split payment across both currencies; mixed payments use the CB exchange rate.
completePay.prepaymentHint: This amount was received when the order was created
completePay.maxInCurrency: · Max total in {{currency}}: same amount · remainder may be collected in {{other}} or split across both (CB rate)
completePay.shortfallHint: Payment is below the amount due. To complete, choose Discount so the unpaid remainder is recorded as a discount, or increase the payment.
completePay.notesDiscountHint: Optional. Choosing Discount still records the remainder; add a note only if you want it on the completion record.
completePay.notesOptional: Optional when the entered payment equals or exceeds the amount due.
completePay.errRateLoading: Exchange rate is still loading. Try again in a moment.
completePay.errDispatchAmount: Enter the delivery / dispatch payment amount (or check dispatch setup).
completePay.errShortfall: Payment is below the amount due. Select Discount to record the remainder, or collect more.
completePay.errExceedsDue: Payment cannot exceed the remaining amount due ({{due}} {{currency}} after advance).
completePay.confirmOverpayTitle: Payment entered is higher than amount due.
completePay.confirmOverpayBook: The extra amount will still be booked as collected sale payment.
completePay.errCbuRate: Could not load CBU exchange rate.
completePay.errEnterPayment: Please enter at least one payment amount.
completePay.errExceedsDueFormatted: Payment cannot exceed the remaining amount due ({{amount}} after advance).
completePay.errExceedsDueAdvanceCbu: Payment cannot exceed the remaining amount due ({{amount}} after advance, at CBU rate).
completePay.confirmCbuRateUsdUzs: Based on CBU exchange rate: 1 USD = {{rate}} UZS
completePay.confirmCrossListed: This sale is listed in {{sc}}. Advance payment was already received.
completePay.confirmCrossRecording: You are recording {{payLabel}} in {{otherCurrency}}{{equiv}} as the balance payment.

deliverySettlement.allDone: All settlement steps are already recorded for sale #{{id}}.
deliverySettlement.step1Intro: Enter what the courier collected from the customer (UZS and/or USD; mixed amounts use the CB rate). Hand-off only — no shop cash movement yet.
deliverySettlement.step1Success: Payment received by dispatch has been recorded.
deliverySettlement.step2Intro: Enter what the courier remitted to the shop (UZS and/or USD — same rules as Complete & Pay). Books sale income and clears receivable where applicable.
deliverySettlement.step2NoPerm: Courier collection is recorded. Shop staff must record payment received by shop — dispatchers cannot book shop remittance or sale income.
deliverySettlement.step2Success: Payment received by shop has been recorded.
deliverySettlement.step3TitlePay: Pay for dispatch & complete sale — Sale #{{id}}
deliverySettlement.step3IntroPay: Pay the dispatch fee from shop balances (UZS and/or USD at CB rate). Marks the sale completed.
deliverySettlement.step3IntroFree: No dispatch fee payout is configured. Submit to mark the sale completed.
deliverySettlement.step3NoPerm: Courier steps are recorded. Shop staff must pay the dispatch fee (if any) and complete the sale — you cannot pay from company balances as a dispatcher.
deliverySettlement.step3SuccessPay: Pay for dispatch completed — sale is now completed.
deliverySettlement.errAmount: Enter at least one amount collected from the customer.
deliverySettlement.errDispatchFee: Enter at least one amount for the dispatch fee.
deliverySettlement.errDispatchCalc: Could not calculate dispatch payment total.
deliverySettlement.settlementFinished: Settlement complete — sale will finish when the shop records the last step
deliverySettlement.confirmStep1Note: This records courier hand-off only (no shop cash movement yet).
deliverySettlement.confirmStep3MismatchNote: Amount differs from dispatch on record — fee will be updated to match.

notifications.errSelectCustomer: Please select a customer before creating sales.
notifications.errAddLine: Add at least one line with a product selected.
notifications.errSellingPrice: Set a selling price for every line (pick a product to prefill it).
notifications.errLayerStock: Insufficient stock in the selected layer for product #{{pid}}: need {{need}}, have {{available}}.
notifications.errInventory: Insufficient inventory for product #{{pid}}: need {{need}}, have {{available}}.
notifications.errPkgNotInInventory: Package type "{{type}}" is not in inventory.
notifications.confirmCancelReserved: Are you sure you want to cancel this reserved sale? The item will be returned to inventory.
notifications.cancelReservedSuccess: Reserved sale cancelled successfully. Item returned to inventory.
notifications.errPkgInsufficient: Insufficient stock for package "{{type}}": need {{need}}, have {{have}}.
